name: GIGABYTE B650M C Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 3x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8000(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-A - HDMI 2.1 - GbE LAN - 802.11ac Wi-Fi
shortName: GIGABYTE B650M C Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for AM5 socket with DDR5 support and multiple M.2 slots.
